Operation 'getUserStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate, but description is too vague about what 'status' means. Added clarity about what status information is returned to help AI agents understand the operation's value and when to use it.

data.current_description: Returns the status of a registered Authy user.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status of a registered Authy user identified by authy_id. Returns status information including whether the user is active, has 2FA enabled, and other account details.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description is too vague about what 'status' means. Added clarity about what status information is returned to help AI agents understand the operation's value and when to use it.

message: Operation 'deleteUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear, but description lacks important context about permanence and side effects. Added information about irreversibility and impact on 2FA methods to help AI agents understand the consequences of this destructive operation.

data.current_description: Removes a user from the application.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently removes a registered Authy user from the application identified by authy_id. This operation is irreversible and will disable all 2FA authentication methods for the user. Returns confirmation of deletion.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear, but description lacks important context about permanence and side effects. Added information about irreversibility and impact on 2FA methods to help AI agents understand the consequences of this destructive operation.

message: Operation 'verifyToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is acceptable but description lacks specificity about inputs and outputs. Added clarity about TOTP validation process, what parameters are expected, and what the response indicates to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Verifies a TOTP token for a user.
data.description_suggestion: Verifies a time-based one-time password (TOTP) token provided by a user identified by authy_id. Accepts the token as a parameter and validates it against the user's registered authenticator. Returns success/failure status and indicates whether the token is valid for 2FA authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is acceptable but description lacks specificity about inputs and outputs. Added clarity about TOTP validation process, what parameters are expected, and what the response indicates to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'requestSmsToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear but description lacks context about what the token is used for and what response to expect. Added information about token purpose, delivery confirmation, and validity period for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Sends an SMS with a verification token to the user.
data.description_suggestion: Sends an SMS containing a verification token to the phone number associated with the user identified by authy_id. The token can be used for 2FA verification. Returns confirmation of SMS delivery and token validity period.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks context about what the token is used for and what response to expect. Added information about token purpose, delivery confirmation, and validity period for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'requestPhoneCall' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear but description is too minimal. Added context about token delivery method (voice), its purpose for 2FA, and what response to expect to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Calls the user with a verification token.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a phone call to the user identified by authy_id, during which a verification token is delivered via voice. The token can be used for 2FA verification. Returns confirmation of call initiation and token validity period.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is too minimal. Added context about token delivery method (voice), its purpose for 2FA, and what response to expect to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'startPhoneVerification' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate but description lacks specificity about required inputs and outputs. Added clarity about what parameters are needed (phone number, delivery method), what the response contains (session identifier), and how this operation fits into the verification workflow for better AI agent guidance.

data.current_description: Starts a phone verification via SMS or voice call. Sends a code to the phone number.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates phone number verification by sending a verification code via SMS or voice call to the specified phone number. Requires the phone number and delivery method (sms or call) as inputs. Returns a verification session identifier and confirmation of code delivery for subsequent verification completion.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks specificity about required inputs and outputs. Added clarity about what parameters are needed (phone number, delivery method), what the response contains (session identifier), and how this operation fits into the verification workflow for better AI agent guidance.

message: Operation 'checkPhoneVerification' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on what inputs are expected (verification code), what the response contains, and the side effect of marking a phone as verified. Added specificity about SMS/voice delivery method, success/failure responses, and state change for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Checks the verification code entered by the user.
data.description_suggestion: Validates a verification code sent to the user's phone number via SMS or voice. Expects the verification code as input. Returns success status and user details if verification succeeds, or error details if the code is invalid or expired. Successful verification marks the phone number as verified in the system.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on what inputs are expected (verification code), what the response contains, and the side effect of marking a phone as verified. Added specificity about SMS/voice delivery method, success/failure responses, and state change for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'createApprovalRequest' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is incomplete - it doesn't explain what input is required (authy_id), what is returned (UUID for tracking), or the context of how OneTouch fits into the authentication flow. Added details about the approval request lifecycle and its role as an alternative verification method.

data.current_description: Sends a push notification to the user's device for approval.
data.description_suggestion: Creates and sends a OneTouch push authentication request to the user's registered device. Requires the user's Authy ID as input. Returns an approval request UUID and status. The user must approve or deny the request on their device within the configured timeout period. Used as an alternative to TOTP or SMS verification.
data.reasoning: Original description is incomplete - it doesn't explain what input is required (authy_id), what is returned (UUID for tracking), or the context of how OneTouch fits into the authentication flow. Added details about the approval request lifecycle and its role as an alternative verification method.

message: Operation 'getApprovalRequestStatus' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to specify what status values are possible, what metadata is returned, and the typical polling pattern for AI agents to understand the operation's role in the OneTouch authentication flow.

data.current_description: Checks the status of a OneTouch approval request.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status of a OneTouch approval request using its UUID. Returns the approval status (pending, approved, denied, or expired) and relevant metadata. Used to poll for user approval after creating an approval request. Typically called repeatedly until the request is resolved or times out.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to specify what status values are possible, what metadata is returned, and the typical polling pattern for AI agents to understand the operation's role in the OneTouch authentication flow.

message: Operation 'getAppDetails' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate. Description is too vague about what 'details' means. Added specificity about what fields are returned and the use case for retrieving this information to help AI agents understand when to call this operation.

data.current_description: Returns details about the Authy application.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves configuration and metadata for the authenticated Authy application. Returns application name, API key status, supported authentication methods (TOTP, SMS, voice, OneTouch), and other application-level settings. Used to verify application configuration and capabilities.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description is too vague about what 'details' means. Added specificity about what fields are returned and the use case for retrieving this information to help AI agents understand when to call this operation.

message: Operation 'getAppStats' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear. Description lacks specificity about what statistics are included and their purpose. Added concrete examples of metrics returned and clarified the use case for monitoring application performance to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns usage statistics for the application.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves usage and performance statistics for the authenticated Authy application. Returns metrics such as total users, active users, authentication attempts, success/failure rates, and other analytics. Useful for monitoring application health and usage patterns. Statistics are typically aggregated over a time period.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description lacks specificity about what statistics are included and their purpose. Added concrete examples of metrics returned and clarified the use case for monitoring application performance to improve AI agent interpretability.
